title: Update VISION.md near-term roadmap — items already implemented
description: VISION.md lines 46-51 list 4 'Near-Term Roadmap' items that are already implemented: (1) Recursive glob patterns (**/*.ts) — expandGlob already supports **; (2) Cross-environment consistency test suite — node-fs-integration.test.ts exists with 21 passing tests; (3) Performance benchmarks — benchmark tests exist in index.test.ts; (4) Test coverage quality gate — vitest.config.ts has {statements:80, branches:75} thresholds. Update roadmap to only list genuinely unimplemented features. Also update line 41 from ~950 lines to ~970 lines to match actual src/index.ts size.
